code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut evens: List<Int> = []
mut odds: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = tokens.get(i)
  match tok
  when Some(s)
    let parsed = string.parse_int(s)
    match parsed
    when Some(n)
      if n % 2 == 0
        evens = list.push(evens, n)
      else
        odds = list.push(odds, n)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut evens_str = ""
mut j = 0
while j < evens.len()
  let v = evens.get(j)
  match v
  when Some(n)
    if j == 0
      evens_str = "#{n}"
    else
      evens_str = "#{evens_str} #{n}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

mut odds_str = ""
mut k = 0
while k < odds.len()
  let v = odds.get(k)
  match v
  when Some(n)
    if k == 0
      odds_str = "#{n}"
    else
      odds_str = "#{odds_str} #{n}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println("evens=#{evens_str}")
println("odds=#{odds_str}")
